scripts.dev: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate && cross-env PLATFORM=Angular astro dev --port 4321
scripts.dev:en: npm run sync:generated-from-xplat && npm run generate:en && cross-env PLATFORM=Angular NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 DOCS_LANG=en astro dev --port 4321
